checkin.journal:
Feeling sleepy but not whole day. Took Amitriptyline for first time. Dermatology procedure, removed thing on head.
Physical: Pelvic floor bit better than yesterday. Massage at Motion Lab, worked on hip. Can move better in padel, Achilles pain less. Left hip moves with bigger ease.
Emotional: Very bloated 6/10. Bowel 2x (level 3 OK, level 4 floating). Sleep not good, only until 5AM, 5 hours. Feeling sleepy, hoping to sleep better.
Gut: Bloating strong 6/10. Acidity seems fine for now.
Exercise: P
